ShortDescription.Value: Export Cities: Skylines II metro networks to JSON for local SVG diagram preview.

Publish.LongDescription:
CS2 Metro Diagram exports metro/subway data from the currently loaded Cities: Skylines II city to a local JSON file.
The export can be opened with the separate Windows Viewer app to preview and save SVG metro diagrams.
Alpha notes: - Metro/subway only. - Exports data only; it does not edit city data. - No in-game SVG preview. - Viewer is packaged separately in the GitHub release bundle.
Publish.ChangeLog: Alpha.2 candidate: - Real metro JSON export. - Export snapshots with timestamped filenames. - City name metadata read from the loaded game city. - Route geometry pathPoints from CS2 route curve data. - Local Windows Viewer with SVG preview, English/Chinese UI, and export-data inspection. - Geographic diagram is the recommended default. - Schematic-v2 remains experimental.
